UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores detailed profile information for a MechHub user.

organization.description: The name of the user's college, team, or startup.

onboarded.description: Whether the user has completed the initial onboarding process.

ConsultationRequest.title: ConsultationRequest
ConsultationRequest.description: Represents a user's request for expert manufacturing guidance and consultation services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ConsultationRequest entity.

name.description: The full name of the user requesting consultation.

phone.description: The phone number of the user for contact purposes.

email.description: The email address of the user for communication.

message.description: A detailed message from the user describing their consultation needs.

consultationOptions.description: A list of selected consultation options (e.g., Design Optimization, DFM Analysis).

requestDate.description: The date and time when the consultation request was submitted.

RFQ.title: RFQ
RFQ.description: Represents a manufacturing request for quotation sent to multiple MechMasters.

definition.description: Stores the user's private profile information.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores user-specific manufacturing requests within their private subcollection.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user who owns the RFQs.

params.name: rfqId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific RFQ.

definition.description: Stores individual requests for expert manufacturing consultation submitted via the public form.

params.name: consultationRequestId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific consultation request.
